reviews.text: They have way too many customers for them to handle. Loads of errors all the time with invoices and medication subscriptions. Medical case manager is near impossible to get hold of via email. On average takes 3-4 days get an answer from …

EDITED 06/10/2024:

If you're going to edit your rude reply out to try and save face, then I'll edit …

At first all seemed so well, I have been dealing Amanda mainly, very nice and supportive, but has not answered my emails in over a week.
I recently orederd a blood kit, it took over a week to arrive, it only arived …
The only problem I found is that I don't speak English, but the doctor is certainly renowned and an excellent doctor, so much so that I want to be treated by him.
